recent.statement: A magnitude 6.0 earthquake will strike near the Mexico City area within the next 24h.
recent.evidence: No signal shows a magnitude 6.0 earthquake near Mexico City; the only Mexico event (S3) was M5.5 and predates the window, and such a large quake would certainly have been captured.

recent.statement: WTI Crude Oil price will drop by 2% within the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: The only crude price signal (Brent) shows just -0.87%, far short of a 2% drop, and no signal shows WTI declining by 2%.

recent.statement: WTI Crude Oil price will drop by 1.5% in the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: WTI moved from ~82.42-82.61 to 82.39 at window close, a decline far under the required 1.5% drop.

recent.statement: A severe thunderstorm warning will be issued for the Midwest within the next 24 hours due to a low-pressure system moving east
recent.evidence: S2 shows a Severe Thunderstorm Warning issued by NWS Des Moines IA, a Midwest location, within the forecast window.

recent.statement: WTI Crude Oil price will drop by at least 2% in the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: The only oil-price signals (Brent at -0.22% and -0.09%) show negligible declines and no signal indicates any ~2% oil price drop, so the forecast did not come true.

recent.statement: A severe thunderstorm warning will be issued for the Midwest region
recent.evidence: S2 shows a Severe Thunderstorm Warning issued by NWS Des Moines IA on July 20 within the window, confirming a severe thunderstorm warning in the Midwest.

recent.statement: A magnitude 6.0 earthquake will occur in the Pacific Ocean within the next 24 hours.
recent.evidence: No signal shows a magnitude 6.0 or greater earthquake in the Pacific Ocean; the closest Pacific signal (S3) was only 5.5M, below the stated threshold.

recent.statement: Severe thunderstorms will affect the Midwest region in the United States
recent.evidence: S2 shows a Severe Thunderstorm Warning issued July 20 by NWS Marquette MI, within the Midwest region and the forecast window.

recent.statement: Severe thunderstorm warning issued for the Midwest region in the United States
recent.evidence: S1 shows NWS Quad Cities IA IL issued a Severe Thunderstorm Warning on July 20, within the Midwest region and forecast window.

recent.statement: A severe thunderstorm warning will be issued for the Midwest region
recent.evidence: S1 shows a Severe Thunderstorm Warning issued July 20 by NWS Quad Cities IA IL, within the Midwest region and the forecast window.

recent.statement: A severe thunderstorm warning will be issued for the Nashville area.
recent.evidence: No captured signal shows a severe thunderstorm warning was issued for the Nashville area within the window.

recent.statement: A tropical cyclone will make landfall in the southeastern United States within the next 24 hours.
recent.evidence: S1 shows only a green-alert tropical depression offshore in the Atlantic and S2 a storm in the East Pacific, with no signal indicating an actual southeastern US landfall.
